summary: Color-graded video set to music of an ICE SRT team arresting a man. It cuts between a wide shot of agents in camouflage and 'POLICE' plate carriers lined up behind an armored vehicle in the rain, close-ups of handcuffs being applied to a man in a green shirt, and shots under a pink and red color wash. Spoken tag at the end: 'We'll talk in the next video.'

script.scene: Wide rainy-street shot: a line of ICE SRT agents in camouflage with 'POLICE' plate carriers and helmets lined up behind a black armored vehicle near suburban houses; wet pavement, gray tone.
An agent in a 'POLICE' vest moves up against a pink clapboard house past a 'PRIVATE PROPERTY NO TRESPASSING' sign; frame is under a pink and magenta color grade.
Close-up of a man's handcuffed hands behind his back in a green shirt as an agent in camouflage gloves holds zip ties; shallow focus.
An agent in an 'SRT' helmet with an ICE patch escorts the cuffed man in the green shirt past a black SUV outside a house with orange fencing.
Low close-up of an agent's back and plate carrier ('POST-...') under a red color wash as he leans into a vehicle; spoken: 'We'll talk in the next video.'

notable_text: We'll talk in the next video
